name_en: Bad Ischl Old Town Historic Center

phrases.intent_en: How do I buy a bus ticket to Salzburg?
phrases.text_local: Wie kaufe ich ein Busticket nach Salzburg?
phrases.cultural_note: Bus tickets in Austria are usually sold at counters or directly on board. Validate before boarding if required.

likely_response.translation_en: At the counter or on the bus.

responses.english: At the counter or on the bus.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Lehár-Villa museum entry?
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Eingang der Lehár-Villa?
phrases.cultural_note: Museums entrances are typically marked with clear signage in Austria. Staff may refer to landmarks if signage is unclear.

phrases.intent_en: Do I need to greet with Grüß Gott in shops?
phrases.text_local: Sagt man in Geschäften Grüß Gott?
phrases.cultural_note: Grüß Gott is a traditional Bavarian-Austrian greeting, expected in shops and formal settings.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I park at the pedestrian zone edge?
phrases.text_local: Wo parke ich am Rand der Fußgängerzone?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking at pedestrian zone edges in Austria is typically available in designated lots or garages nearby.

phrases.intent_en: Is there a minimum spend on the cafe terrace?
phrases.text_local: Gibt es einen Mindestverzehr auf der Caféterrasse?
phrases.cultural_note: Minimum spend policies are common in Austrian cafes and restaurants to discourage single drink orders.
